requirement_topic.en: EU Authorised Representative & Importer Obligations — RED Art. 11–14 (Cyprus / OCECPR)
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟授权代表及进口商义务 — RED第11–14条（塞浦路斯 / OCECPR）
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟授權代表及進口商義務 — RED第11–14條（賽普勒斯 / OCECPR）

summary.en: Under RED 2014/53/EU Articles 11–14, a manufacturer established outside the EU must appoint an EU Authorised Representative (EU AR) before placing radio equipment on the EU market, including Cyprus. The EU AR is a natural or legal person established in the EU who acts on behalf of the manufacturer and is the point of contact for OCECPR and other market surveillance authorities. The EU AR must be named in the Declaration of Conformity (DoC), on the product label, and in the technical documentation. The importer (the person who places third-country products on the EU market) bears distinct legal obligations: verifying conformity, ensuring DoC and technical file are available, affixing importer name and address on the product, and retaining documentation for 10 years. Cyprus's small market size means goods often enter via regional hubs (Limassol port, Larnaca airport) or through intermediaries; the importer role may fall on a Cypriot distributor unless a dedicated EU importer entity is established. OCECPR can request the DoC and full technical documentation from the EU AR or importer at any time. Note: the EU AR must be established in an EU member state — following Brexit, a UK-based representative no longer qualifies as an EU AR for Cyprus or any other EU market.
summary.zh: 依据RED 2014/53/EU第11–14条，在欧盟境外设立的制造商须在将无线电设备投放欧盟市场（包括塞浦路斯）之前，委任欧盟授权代表（EU AR）。欧盟授权代表是在欧盟境内设立的自然人或法人，代表制造商行事，并作为OCECPR及其他市场监管机关的联络点。EU AR须在合格声明（DoC）、产品标签和技术文件中列明。进口商（即将第三国产品投放欧盟市场的人员）承担独立的法律义务：核实符合性、确保DoC和技术文件可供查阅、在产品上标注进口商名称和地址，以及保存文件10年。塞浦路斯市场规模较小，货物通常通过区域枢纽（利马索尔港、拉纳卡机场）或中间商进入；除非设立专门的欧盟进口商实体，否则进口商角色可能由塞浦路斯经销商承担。OCECPR可随时要求EU AR或进口商提供DoC及完整技术文件。注意：EU AR须在欧盟成员国设立——脱欧后，设立于英国的代表不再具备在塞浦路斯或任何其他欧盟市场担任EU AR的资格。
summary.zht: 依據RED 2014/53/EU第11–14條，在歐盟境外設立的製造商須在將無線電設備投放歐盟市場（包括賽普勒斯）之前，委任歐盟授權代表（EU AR）。歐盟授權代表是在歐盟境內設立的自然人或法人，代表製造商行事，並作為OCECPR及其他市場監管機關的聯絡點。EU AR須在合格聲明（DoC）、產品標籤和技術文件中列明。進口商（即將第三國產品投放歐盟市場的人員）承擔獨立的法律義務：核實符合性、確保DoC和技術文件可供查閱、在產品上標注進口商名稱和地址，以及保存文件10年。賽普勒斯市場規模較小，貨物通常通過區域樞紐（利馬索爾港、拉納卡機場）或中間商進入；除非設立專門的歐盟進口商實體，否則進口商角色可能由賽普勒斯經銷商承擔。OCECPR可隨時要求EU AR或進口商提供DoC及完整技術文件。注意：EU AR須在歐盟成員國設立——脫歐後，設立於英國的代表不再具備在賽普勒斯或任何其他歐盟市場擔任EU AR的資格。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU (RED), Art. 11 (Importers), Art. 12 (Distributors), Art. 13 (Cases in which obligations of manufacturers apply to importers and distributors), Art. 14 (Authorised representatives)
Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — market surveillance and conformity of products; importer and distributor obligations
Cyprus Radio Equipment Law 107(I)/2017 — national transposition of RED 2014/53/EU

summary.en: China has no requirement for an EU-style Authorised Representative for domestic market placement. Chinese regulatory frameworks (SRRC, CCC, MIIT NAL) are manufacturer-facing obligations administered by Chinese authorities. For export products, Chinese manufacturers are not required by Chinese law to appoint a representative in the destination country. The concept of a third-party legal representative bearing manufacturer obligations in the destination market has no direct Chinese equivalent. REACH/RoHS-equivalent obligations in China (GB/T 26572-2011 on restricted substances) are self-certified by manufacturers without a separate representative requirement.
summary.zh: 中国对于国内市场投放没有欧盟式授权代表的要求。中国监管框架（SRRC、CCC、工信部进网许可证）是由中国主管机构管理的面向制造商的义务。对于出口产品，中国法律不要求中国制造商在目的地国家委任代表。第三方法人代表在目的地市场承担制造商义务的概念在中国没有直接的等效形式。中国的REACH/RoHS等效义务（GB/T 26572-2011有害物质限制）由制造商自我认证，无需单独的代表要求。
summary.zht: 中國對於國內市場投放沒有歐盟式授權代表的要求。中國監管框架（SRRC、CCC、工信部進網許可證）是由中國主管機構管理的面向製造商的義務。對於出口產品，中國法律不要求中國製造商在目的地國家委任代表。第三方法人代表在目的地市場承擔製造商義務的概念在中國沒有直接的等效形式。中國的REACH/RoHS等效義務（GB/T 26572-2011有害物質限制）由製造商自我認證，無需單獨的代表要求。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Type Approval — NRA/MIIT; manufacturer-facing obligation; no EU AR equivalent
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA-C17-01); no EU AR equivalent
GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (Chinese RoHS equivalent)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting wireless devices to Cyprus must appoint a named EU Authorised Representative established in an EU member state before first shipment. The EU AR must be: (1) named in the EU Declaration of Conformity; (2) named on the product or packaging label (name and EU address); (3) named in all technical documentation retained for OCECPR. A UK-based representative does not qualify as an EU AR post-Brexit, which is a particular pitfall for Chinese manufacturers who historically routed EU compliance through UK representatives before Brexit. Failure to appoint an EU AR renders the product non-compliant under RED Art. 14 and subjects both the manufacturer and importer to OCECPR enforcement action. Where no dedicated EU importer exists, the Cypriot distributor bears importer-level obligations including 10-year document retention. RoHS 2 (Directive 2011/65/EU) and WEEE registration with Green Dot Cyprus are additional obligations linked to EU AR appointment that have no Chinese domestic equivalent.
gap.zh: 中国制造商向塞浦路斯出口无线设备，须在首次发货前委任在欧盟成员国设立的具名欧盟授权代表。EU AR须：（1）在欧盟合格声明中列明；（2）在产品或包装标签上列明（名称和欧盟地址）；（3）在为OCECPR保存的所有技术文件中列明。英国注册代表在脱欧后不具备EU AR资格，这对于历史上通过英国代表处理欧盟合规事务的中国制造商而言是特别需要注意的陷阱。未委任EU AR将导致产品依据RED第14条不合规，并使制造商和进口商均面临OCECPR执法行动。若不存在专门的欧盟进口商，塞浦路斯经销商须承担进口商级别的义务，包括文件保存10年。RoHS 2（指令2011/65/EU）和向塞浦路斯绿点组织进行WEEE注册，是与EU AR委任相关联的额外义务，在中国国内无等效要求。
gap.zht: 中國製造商向賽普勒斯出口無線設備，須在首次發貨前委任在歐盟成員國設立的具名歐盟授權代表。EU AR須：（1）在歐盟合格聲明中列明；（2）在產品或包裝標籤上列明（名稱和歐盟地址）；（3）在為OCECPR保存的所有技術文件中列明。英國註冊代表在脫歐後不具備EU AR資格，這對於歷史上通過英國代表處理歐盟合規事務的中國製造商而言是特別需要注意的陷阱。未委任EU AR將導致產品依據RED第14條不合規，並使製造商和進口商均面臨OCECPR執法行動。若不存在專門的歐盟進口商，賽普勒斯經銷商須承擔進口商級別的義務，包括文件保存10年。RoHS 2（指令2011/65/EU）和向賽普勒斯綠點組織進行WEEE登記，是與EU AR委任相關聯的額外義務，在中國國內無等效要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU Art. 14; EU Authorised Representative required for non-EU manufacturers; importer obligations under Art. 11; enforced by OCECPR; UK-based representatives do not qualify post-Brexit
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no Chinese domestic equivalent to EU Authorised Representative requirement; SRRC/CCC are manufacturer-facing self-certification obligations

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EU Authorised Representative appointment is mandatory for Chinese manufacturers placing wireless devices on the Cypriot market. The EU AR must be established in an EU member state (UK-based representatives do not qualify post-Brexit). The EU AR must be named in the DoC, on the product label, and in all technical documentation. No Chinese certification (SRRC, CCC, MIIT NAL) substitutes for this obligation. OCECPR enforces at import stage. RoHS 2 compliance and Green Dot Cyprus WEEE registration are linked obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 欧盟授权代表委任是中国制造商向塞浦路斯市场投放无线设备的强制要求。EU AR须在欧盟成员国设立（英国注册代表在脱欧后不具备资格）。EU AR须在合格声明、产品标签及所有技术文件中列明。任何中国认证（SRRC、CCC、工信部进网许可证）均不能替代此义务。OCECPR在进口阶段执法。RoHS 2合规和向塞浦路斯绿点组织进行WEEE注册是关联义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 歐盟授權代表委任是中國製造商向賽普勒斯市場投放無線設備的強制要求。EU AR須在歐盟成員國設立（英國註冊代表在脫歐後不具備資格）。EU AR須在合格聲明、產品標籤及所有技術文件中列明。任何中國認證（SRRC、CCC、工信部進網許可證）均不能取代此義務。OCECPR在進口階段執法。RoHS 2合規和向賽普勒斯綠點組織進行WEEE登記是關聯義務。
